boonCookieDescription: Earn $1 at end of round. Increases by $2 when a Boss is defeated
boonAllinDescription: Adds X4 Mult on final move of round
boonOffgridDescription: Fügt am Ende jedes Zuges <point>+${arg:scoreCalculationValue1} Points</point> hinzu (ein Punkt pro Feld)
boonClickbaitDescription: Fügt <multi>+2 Multi</multi> pro Shop-Neuwurf in diesem Run hinzu (aktuell <multi>+${arg:scoreCalculationValue1} Multi</multi>)
